tasks.title: Add --round and --findings flags with validation
tasks.acceptance: --round flag (int, default 1) and --findings flag (string) exist on tp review command. round < 1 exits with code 2. --findings file missing exits with code 2. --round > 1 without --findings outputs warning hint via output.Warn(). Flags are wired into runReview signature.
tasks.closed_reason: Flags added to newReviewCmd: --round (int, default 1) and --findings (string). Validation: round<1 exits code 2, missing findings file exits code 2, round>1 without --findings outputs info warning.

tasks.title: Parse findings NDJSON file into reviewFinding struct
tasks.acceptance: reviewFinding struct exists with severity, category, location, finding, suggestion fields. parseFindingsFile() reads NDJSON, parses each line, skips invalid lines with warning, defaults missing fields (severity='unknown', others=''), returns []reviewFinding.
tasks.closed_reason: reviewFinding struct with severity/category/location/finding/suggestion. parseFindingsFile() reads NDJSON, skips invalid lines with warning, defaults missing fields.

tasks.title: Deduplicate findings and build summary string
tasks.acceptance: dedupFindings() deduplicates by (category, location). buildFindingsSummary() sorts by severity (critical>high>medium>low) then category, abbreviates severity ([CRIT],[HIGH],[MED],[LOW]), formats as '[SEV] category — location: finding', truncates finding to 80 chars, caps at 50 entries with '... and N more' suffix. Returns empty string if no findings.
tasks.closed_reason: dedupFindings() deduplicates by (category,location). buildFindingsSummary() sorts by severity, abbreviates, truncates to 80 chars, caps at 50. Returns empty string if no findings.

tasks.title: Inject findings summary into prompts with round-aware modifications
tasks.acceptance: When --findings provided: each prompt has findings summary block prepended before spec content. When --round >= 2: prompt opening includes 'This is review round {N} — focus ONLY on issues not previously reported'. Finding format section appends 'Remember: only report NEW issues not covered by the previous findings listed above.' When no findings: prompts unchanged.
tasks.closed_reason: When --findings: summary block prepended before spec content in all 3 prompts. When --round>=2: round-aware opening with review round N context. Finding format section appends 'only report NEW issues' reminder.

tasks.title: Update review_loop output with round and previous_findings
tasks.acceptance: reviewLoop struct has Round int and PreviousFindings int fields. Output JSON includes round (from --round flag) and previous_findings (count of loaded findings). instruction updated to include '--round N+1 --findings <file>' guidance when round < max_rounds. Backward compat: round=1, previous_findings=0 when flags not used.
tasks.closed_reason: reviewLoop struct has Round and PreviousFindings fields. Output JSON includes round and previous_findings. Instruction updated with --round N+1 --findings guidance. Backward compat maintained.

tasks.title: Add tests for multi-round review
tasks.acceptance: Test cases pass: (1) Round 1 no findings = backward compat. (2) Round 2 with findings = summary in prompts, review_loop.round=2. (3) Round 2 without findings = warning. (4) Round 0 = exit code 2. (5) Findings file not found = exit code 2. (6) Duplicate (category,location) = deduplicated. (7) >50 findings = capped at 50. (8) Long finding text = truncated 80 chars. (9) Invalid lines = skipped with warning. (10) Empty findings = no injection.
tasks.closed_reason: 10 test cases all passing in review_test.go: (1) TestReviewRound1BackwardCompat confirms round=1, previous_findings=0, no summary injection. (2) TestReviewRound2WithFindings confirms summary block in all 3 prompts with [HIGH]/[MED] labels and round 2 context. (3) TestReviewRound2WithoutFindings confirms round=2 without --findings works with zero previous_findings. (4) TestReviewRound0 confirms exit code 2 and error message. (5) TestReviewFindingsFileNotFound confirms exit code 2. (6) TestReviewFindingsDedup confirms 3 findings with duplicate (category,location) reduce to 2 unique. (7) TestReviewFindingsCappedAt50 confirms 55 findings show 50 with omission suffix. (8) TestReviewFindingsLongText confirms truncation at 80 chars. (9) TestReviewFindingsInvalidLines confirms 2 invalid lines skipped, 1 valid parsed. (10) TestReviewEmptyFindingsFile confirms no injection when empty.
